'''ây-z-m-r''' ('''kayazmeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yikker|yikker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yikker|yikker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-z-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kayazmeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazmeroko|thiyazmeroko]] || [[word:jiyazmeroko|jiyazmeroko]] || [[word:shiyazmeroko|shiyazmeroko]] || [[word:kiyazmeroko|kiyazmeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazmeroko|thoyazmeroko]] || [[word:joyazmeroko|joyazmeroko]] || [[word:shoyazmeroko|shoyazmeroko]] || [[word:koyazmeroko|koyazmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyazmeroko|thĂŠyazmeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠyazmeroko|jĂŠyazmeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠyazmeroko|shĂŠyazmeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠyazmeroko|kĂŠyazmeroko]]
|-

|-

|}
